title: rubus praeceptorum
intro: Rubus praeceptorum, also known as the New Zealand blackthorn or New Zealand thorn, is a thorny shrub native to New Zealand. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Rubus praeceptorum include its ability to protect against infections, reduce pain and inflammation, and support overall immune function. Rubus praeceptorum is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and promote health and wellness.
